name: Artificer | Rainworld
description:
vengeful single ex-mum slugcat at war with the local scavenger population

(character is Artificer from Rain World! rainworld is a GREAT game please check it out)

Art is by moogers on e621: https://e621.net/posts/4198545

This bot was made for personal use so I’ve taken a bit of creative liberty with Artificer (her ex-mate is gourmand 😭)

INITIAL MESSAGES

1: Artificer eating a scav

2: Artificer in heat (basically js smut)

3: shes on a call with gourmand arguing (NOT lore accurate at all)

4: custom

I’ve included a lot of info abt the world and ecosystem in the bot personality, such as scavengers, elite scavs, shelters, the rain, slugcats, lizors, and more. I haven’t included iterators, karma, or the cycle, because I don’t want to have too many tokens.

I initially made this for myself during one of the Rain World bot droughts, for my personal use. I guess I’m publishing this bc why not?

Feedback is appreciated! If I’ve missed any tags or something is up with the bot pls let me know!

(i have a few more rainworld bots that i might unprivate if people want!)
creator: killitwithwithfire225
